name: douyin-deep-profile-collect
description: 深度采集抖音个人主页信息，包含基础资料、作品列表（含播放数）、喜欢列表、收藏列表、全量关注列表（虚拟滚动加载）
original_query: 采集抖音个人主页的信息、发布内容、关注、收藏、点赞等，全量数据
original_res: 成功采集：基础资料(昵称/性别/地区/抖音号/关注数/粉丝数/获赞数)、全部作品(标题+播放数)、喜欢列表、收藏列表、全量关注列表

steps.description: 导航到抖音个人主页。已登录态下/user/self自动跳转到当前用户主页。不带active:false以获取tabId

output.tab_id: 导航返回的tabId，后续所有步骤复用

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); const h=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); window.scrollTo({top:h,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); const h2=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); if(h2>h){window.scrollTo({top:h2,behavior:'smooth'});await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1500));} window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); return JSON.stringify({url:window.location.href, title:document.title, fullText:document.body.innerText}); }

steps.description: 提取作品页（默认tab）：滚动加载全部作品 → 提取全文。包含基础资料(昵称/性别/地区/抖音号/关注粉丝获赞)和全部作品标题+播放数

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { const tabs=document.querySelectorAll('.semi-tabs-tab'); for(let t of tabs){if(t.textContent.trim()==='喜欢'){t.click();break;}} await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,3000)); window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); const h=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); window.scrollTo({top:h,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); const h2=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); if(h2>h){window.scrollTo({top:h2,behavior:'smooth'});await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1500));} window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); return JSON.stringify({section:'likes',fullText:document.body.innerText}); }

steps.description: 切换到「喜欢」tab并提取：点击.semi-tabs-tab文本为'喜欢'的元素 → 等待加载 → 滚动 → 提取全文。包含用户点赞过的视频标题和播放数

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { const tabs=document.querySelectorAll('.semi-tabs-tab'); for(let t of tabs){if(t.textContent.trim()==='收藏'){t.click();break;}} await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,3000)); window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); const h=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); window.scrollTo({top:h,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); const h2=Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight,document.documentElement.scrollHeight); if(h2>h){window.scrollTo({top:h2,behavior:'smooth'});await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1500));} window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); return JSON.stringify({section:'favorites',fullText:document.body.innerText}); }

steps.description: 切换到「收藏」tab并提取：点击.semi-tabs-tab文本为'收藏'的元素 → 等待加载 → 滚动 → 提取全文。包含用户收藏的视频标题和播放数

tool_params.jsScript: () => { const divs=document.querySelectorAll('div.uvGnYXqn'); for(let d of divs){if(d.textContent.trim()==='关注'){d.parentElement.click();return JSON.stringify({ok:true});}} return JSON.stringify({ok:false}); }

steps.description: 点击个人资料区域的「关注」数字打开关注侧边面板。面板不是modal/dialog，是侧边滑出panel

tool_params.jsScript: async () => { await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2000)); let panel=null; const allDivs=document.querySelectorAll('div'); let maxLinks=0; for(let d of allDivs){const links=d.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/user/"]').length;if(links>maxLinks&&d.scrollHeight>300){maxLinks=links;panel=d;}} if(!panel) return JSON.stringify({error:'no_panel'}); let prevH=0,same=0; for(let i=0;i<100;i++){panel.scrollTop=panel.scrollHeight;panel.dispatchEvent(new WheelEvent('wheel',{deltaY:500,bubbles:true}));await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));if(panel.scrollHeight===prevH){same++;if(same>15)break;}else same=0;prevH=panel.scrollHeight;} const users=[],seen=new Set(); panel.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/user/"]').forEach(a=>{const href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';const name=a.textContent.trim();if(name.length>0&&name.length<60&&!seen.has(href)){seen.add(href);users.push({name:name.substring(0,40),href:href});}}); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/user/"]').forEach(a=>{const href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';const name=a.textContent.trim();if(name.length>0&&name.length<60&&!seen.has(href)&&!name.includes('的抖音')){seen.add(href);users.push({name:name.substring(0,40),href:href});}}); return JSON.stringify({count:users.length,users:users}); }

steps.description: 全量滚动关注面板并提取用户列表：找到包含最多user链接的容器 → 通过WheelEvent+scrollTop激进滚动100轮(300ms/轮) → 提取所有a[href*=/user/]去重。面板使用虚拟滚动，必须用WheelEvent触发加载
关闭抖音标签页，清理浏览器资源
